dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7440 IH: To direct the Secretary of Transportation to convey all right, title, and interest to certain property to the San Mateo County Transit District.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Mullin introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure

form.official-title: To direct the Secretary of Transportation to convey all right, title, and interest to certain property to the San Mateo County Transit District.

section.text: On the date of enactment of this Act, the Secretary of Transportation shall convey, without consideration, all right, title, and interest of the Federal Government in and to the Colma Park and Ride Lot (Federal Aid Project No. IR–280–1 (876)) to the San Mateo County Transit District.
